description: MCP server for Google Calendar integration with service account support and domain-wide delegation.
name: com.pulsemcp/google-calendar

environmentVariables.description: Service account email address from Google Cloud Console.
environmentVariables.name: GCAL_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_CLIENT_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Service account private key in PEM format from Google Cloud Console.
environmentVariables.name: GCAL_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Email address of the user whose calendar to access via domain-wide delegation.
environmentVariables.name: GCAL_IMPERSONATE_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tool groups to enable (readonly or readwrite).
environmentVariables.name: ENABLED_TOOLGROUPS
